hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ ! -f HANDOFF.md ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Write HANDOFF.md before compacting. Use the template in AGENTS.md. Include: what was done, current state, files modified, next action."; exit 2; fi'

hooks.prompt: If any source files were modified, added, or deleted during this session, write HANDOFF.md now following the exact template in AGENTS.md. Include every section: Completed, Current state, Files modified table, and Next action.

hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in *"pytest tests/ "*|*"pytest tests "*) echo "STOP: Do not run the full test suite. Target a specific test: uv run pytest tests/test_<name>.py -x -v"; exit 2 ;; *"cat src/"*) echo "STOP: Do not cat entire source files. Use targeted reads or sed -n line ranges."; exit 2 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac'
